project.name: Stair Transport Split Weight
project.description: Stair-system sample with max-weight transport sectioning.

sc_stair_system_system_pattern.notes: Top-level stair system solved layout and child component composition.

sc_stair_system_flight_1_flight_pattern.notes: Solved flight layout metadata. Physical parts are generated by tread, support, railing, and connection child components.

sc_stair_system_treads_tread_pattern.notes: Generated stair tread set from family-specific capabilities.

sc_stair_system_railing_railing_pattern.notes: Generated bolted stair railing with filled panels.

sc_stair_system_connections_connection_p.notes: Generated hardware: bearing cleats, floor fixings, slab fixings, and post bases.

sc_stair_system_section_splices_connecti.notes: Generated member splice plate, bolt set, and trim-based section break.

sc_stair_system_section_splices_memberSp.notes: Member splice split plane before section_split_1

migrationHistory.description: Renamed generic patterns to holePatterns, added objectPatterns/authoring provenance, fabrication marks, tolerances, and connection/frame library refs.
Added generated fin plate demo using the minimal connection framework.
